description: Distilled thinking framework of @aleabitoreddit. Analyzes AI/semiconductor supply chain bottlenecks to produce directional calls on small-cap semiconductor stocks. Based on 5 mental models (chokepoint theory, bottleneck game theory, NVIDIA signal reading, information asymmetry, positive-sum markets) and 8 decision heuristics.
output_character: directional call on individual semiconductor/technology stocks — bullish/bearish with confidence and a bottleneck-focused thesis
author: leslieyeo/serenity-reply (distilled by Nuwa Skill Creation)
